metadata.description: AI agents and skills for automated software development

plugins.name: triage-agent
plugins.description: Analyzes issues to determine actionability; no skill dependencies

plugins.name: architect-agent
plugins.description: Designs solution architecture; includes security-awareness and scalability-resilience skills

plugins.name: implementer-agent
plugins.description: Implements solutions; includes security-awareness, scalability-resilience, and code-quality-fundamentals skills

plugins.name: test-engineer
plugins.description: Writes unit and integration tests; includes code-quality-fundamentals and test-patterns skills

plugins.name: security-reviewer
plugins.description: Reviews code for security vulnerabilities; includes security-awareness and security-owasp skills

plugins.name: pr-reviewer
plugins.description: Reviews PRs for quality; includes security-awareness, code-quality-fundamentals, and code-review-standards skills

plugins.name: security-awareness
plugins.description: Input validation, secret handling, least privilege, and defensive coding fundamentals

plugins.name: code-quality-fundamentals
plugins.description: Naming conventions, SOLID principles, error handling, and code organization

plugins.name: scalability-resilience
plugins.description: Single points of failure, graceful degradation, idempotency, and resilience patterns

plugins.name: security-owasp
plugins.description: OWASP Top 10 review guidance with concrete code patterns and severity bands

plugins.name: test-patterns
plugins.description: Testing strategies, mocking, fixture management, edge cases, and the testing pyramid

plugins.name: code-review-standards
plugins.description: Code review methodology, severity classification, and actionable feedback standards

plugins.name: go-skills
plugins.description: Go development idioms, patterns, and conventions

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Fetch up-to-date library and framework documentation via Context7

plugins.name: serena
plugins.description: Semantic code navigation, symbol-level editing, and persistent project memories

plugins.name: mcp-atlassian
plugins.description: Jira and Confluence integration for issue tracking and documentation

plugins.name: bitbucket-cloud
plugins.description: Bitbucket Cloud API for repositories, pull requests, and code review

plugins.name: shipwright-full
plugins.description: All 6 agents + all 7 skills + all 4 MCPs in one install
